summary: Completed comprehensive re-validation of Business Radar AI after main agent fixed 4 critical bugs from iteration_3. ALL 54 TESTS PASSED (100% success rate). All 7 architectural areas now pass clean: Alembic migration 0002 applied, rate limiting working, idempotency working, scheduler working, health monitoring working, report generation FIXED (PDF/CSV/XLSX downloads all working), and RBAC FIXED for all three roles including Subscriber.

passed_tests: ✅ ALEMBIC: Migration 0002_business_source_run_id applied (verified via psql: version_num = '0002_business_source_run_id')
✅ ALEMBIC: businesses.source_run_id column exists with FK to discovery_source_runs(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
✅ ALEMBIC: Index ix_businesses_source_run_id exists
✅ ALEMBIC: GET /api/businesses returns 200 (confirms schema drift fixed)
✅ RATE LIMITING: Burst limit triggered (6 rapid wrong-password logins → 429 with Retry-After header)
✅ RATE LIMITING: Successful login after 15s burst window clears counter
✅ IDEMPOTENCY: First discovery run succeeds, second with same key returns cached result (no new inserts)
✅ IDEMPOTENCY: Same key with different payload returns 409 Conflict
✅ SCHEDULER: PATCH schedule_cron with valid cron (*/5 * * * *) succeeds and updates DB
✅ SCHEDULER: PATCH with invalid cron ('not a cron') still succeeds (scheduler skips it, logs warning)
✅ SCHEDULER: PATCH with null cron clears schedule
✅ HEALTH: GET /api/discovery/health returns correct structure (totals, queue, sources)
✅ HEALTH: Source-level health has rolling_24h stats with all expected keys
✅ HEALTH: Alert levels are green/amber/red
✅ HEALTH: Run count increases after discovery run
✅ HEALTH: last_success_at populated after successful run
✅ HEALTH: GET /api/discovery/sources/{id}/health works
✅ REPORTS (FIXED): GET /api/reports/today returns 200 with report_pdf field populated (file:///app/backend/reports_out/daily-reports/daily_2026-06-14.pdf)
✅ REPORTS (FIXED): POST /api/reports/generate returns 200 with fresh PDF URI
✅ REPORTS (FIXED): GET /api/reports/{id}/download/pdf returns valid binary PDF (4297 bytes, >1KB)
✅ REPORTS (FIXED): PDF has correct content-type (application/pdf) and Content-Disposition header
✅ REPORTS (FIXED): CSV download works (GET /api/reports/{id}/download/csv returns 200)
✅ REPORTS (FIXED): XLSX download works (GET /api/reports/{id}/download/xlsx returns 200)
✅ REPORTS (FIXED): Signed URL endpoint returns {url:null, expires_in:0} for local storage
✅ RBAC: Admin can PATCH /api/discovery/sources, POST /api/discovery/queue/process, POST /api/reports/generate
✅ RBAC: Analyst can POST /api/discovery/run, POST /api/discovery/sources/{id}/run, POST /api/reports/generate
✅ RBAC: Analyst CANNOT PATCH /api/discovery/sources (403 correct)
✅ RBAC (FIXED): Subscriber CAN GET /api/businesses (200, was 500 in iteration_3)
✅ RBAC (FIXED): Subscriber CAN GET /api/dashboard (200, was 500 in iteration_3)
✅ RBAC (FIXED): Subscriber CAN GET /api/reports (200)
✅ RBAC (FIXED): Subscriber CAN download PDF reports (GET /api/reports/{id}/download/pdf returns 200)
✅ RBAC: Subscriber CANNOT POST /api/discovery/run (403 correct)
✅ RBAC: Subscriber CANNOT PATCH /api/discovery/sources (403 correct)
✅ RBAC: Subscriber CANNOT POST /api/reports/generate (403 correct)
✅ RBAC: Unauthenticated GET /api/businesses returns 401
✅ RBAC: Public endpoints /api/ and /api/healthz accessible without auth
Alembic Migration 0002: Applied successfully with source_run_id column, FK, and index
Rate Limiting: Burst and sustained limits working with 429 + Retry-After, 15s sleep between scenarios
Idempotency: Cached responses and 409 conflict detection working
Scheduler: Dynamic schedule registration, updates, and invalid cron handling working
Health Monitoring: Rolling 24h stats with alert levels working
Report Generation: PDF/CSV/XLSX downloads all working, report_pdf field populated, PDF size >1KB
RBAC: All three roles (Admin, Analyst, Subscriber) working correctly with proper read/write permissions

verification_completed: ✅ Alembic migration 0002 applied (verified via psql: version_num = '0002_business_source_run_id')
✅ businesses.source_run_id column exists with FK fk_businesses_source_run_id to discovery_source_runs(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
✅ All 4 bugs from iteration_3 are now FIXED:
1. Schema drift on businesses.source_run_id → FIXED via migration 0002
2. DailyReportOut schema missing report_pdf field → FIXED (field now present and populated)
3. Global exception handler logging → FIXED (now logs method + path + traceback)
4. Subscriber role 500 errors on /api/businesses and /api/dashboard → FIXED (both return 200)
✅ Report generation fully working: PDF (4297 bytes), CSV, XLSX downloads all return 200
✅ All RBAC permissions working correctly for Admin, Analyst, and Subscriber roles
✅ Rate limiting, idempotency, scheduler, and health monitoring all working as expected
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: ALL 7 AREAS NOW PASS CLEAN. Main agent successfully resolved all issues from iteration_3. No further action required.
